user.title: Home Assistant Cloud Setup
user.description: Connect your Home Assistant to the cloud backend for device synchronization and remote control.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthorize Home Assistant Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key needs to be updated. Please provide a valid API key.

error.invalid_api_key: The provided API key is invalid. Please check your key and try again.
error.connection_failed: Unable to connect to the cloud API. Please check your internet connection and API URL.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

init.title: Cloud Integration Options
init.description: Configure advanced options for the cloud integration.

sync_devices.name: Sync Devices
sync_devices.description: Manually sync all devices and entities with the cloud backend.

send_command.name: Send Command
send_command.description: Send a command to a specific entity through the cloud.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity to send the command to.

action.name: Action
action.description: The action to perform (e.g., turn_on, turn_off, set_brightness).

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Additional parameters for the command as a JSON object.

cloud_connection_failed.title: Cloud Connection Failed
cloud_connection_failed.description: The connection to the Home Assistant Cloud backend has failed. Please check your internet connection and API configuration.

sync_failed.title: Device Sync Failed
sync_failed.description: Unable to sync devices with the cloud backend. The integration will retry automatically.

api_key_expired.title: API Key Expired
api_key_expired.description: Your API key has expired or been revoked. Please update your configuration with a valid API key.
